# Fixture: walter_sweasey_stop_replying
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 14.1s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Walter! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started! Your first step is to complete your orientation in the app and you get paid $10 when you finish it! Reply HELP if you have any questions
Partner: Okay 👍
Concierge: Great, Walter! The orientation is all done in the Shiftsmart app and takes about 45 minutes. Let me know if you have any questions as you go!
Partner: Okay

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
You got it!
